name: Louisville Federal
description_short: Louisville Federal Credit Union is a federally insured credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards to members in the Louisville, Kentucky area.
description_long:
Louisville Federal Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative serving the Louisville, Kentucky region. The institution is federally insured by the NCUA and holds NMLS# 522619, providing members with deposit protection and regulatory oversight. The credit union has maintained operations with a main office in the United States Post Office Building and a downtown branch in the Mazzoli Federal Building.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, share certificates with APYs ranging from 4.00% to 4.50%, auto loans (as low as 4.69%), motorcycle and boat loans (6.29%), home equity fixed-rate loans (5.69%), and credit cards. Members also have access to online banking through eBranch, bill pay services, check reordering, and ATM access through the Alliance One network. The institution provides calculators and financial education resources to support member financial planning.

Louisville Federal distinguishes itself as a member-focused institution with personalized service at two physical locations and limited but essential banking services. The credit union emphasizes community partnerships, offering member discounts at Derby Dinner Playhouse and through Liberty Mutual Insurance (up to 10% discount). Their routing number is 283079311, and they maintain restricted wire transfer policies, instead encouraging the use of their free bill pay application for fund transfers.

The credit union is best suited for Louisville-area residents and employees seeking basic banking services with competitive rates and community ties. However, potential members should note the limited branch hours (closed weekends and evenings except Friday), geographic limitation to the Louisville area, and the restriction on personal wire transfers, which may inconvenience those needing frequent or immediate fund transfers.
pros: Federally insured by NCUA with regulated status (NMLS# 522619)
Competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 4.69%
Share certificate APYs up to 4.50% for 6-month terms
Free bill pay service for member fund transfers
Member discounts available at Derby Dinner Playhouse and Liberty Mutual Insurance (up to 10%)
Alliance One ATM network access for extended cash availability
cons: Limited branch hours: closed weekends, early weekday closures (main office closes at 4:00 PM Mon-Thu), downtown branch has minimal hours (only 3 hours Mon-Thu, 3 hours Friday)
Does not accept personal wire transfers to/from checking or savings accounts, limiting transfer options
Geographically restricted to Louisville area with only two physical locations
Website lacks detailed information about account fees, minimum balance requirements, and full loan terms
No mention of mobile banking app or modern digital banking features beyond eBranch
best_for: Louisville-area residents and employees seeking basic checking and savings accounts with local service
Auto and motorcycle buyers looking for competitive fixed-rate financing below 7%
Savers interested in share certificates with rates above typical savings accounts
Community-oriented consumers who value member discounts and local credit union relationships
diagnosis: Louisville Federal Credit Union is best for Louisville-area residents seeking straightforward banking services with competitive loan rates and a community-oriented credit union structure. The main caveat is the severely limited branch hours and lack of wire transfer capabilities, which may prove restrictive for those needing frequent or flexible banking access.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Louisville Federal — NCUA-insured credit union in Louisville, KY. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
